questions.question:
Determine the number of page faults when references to pages occur in the order 1,2,4,5,2,1,2,4. Assume that the main memory can accommodate 3 pages and the main memory already has the pages 1 and 2, with page 1 brought earlier than page 2. (assume LRU i.e., Least-Recently-Used algorithm is applied)

(ISRO CSE 2018)

questions.question:

questions.question:
Which of the following statement is true?

(ISRO CSE 2017)
options:
A.

Hard real time OS has less jitter than soft real time OS

B.

Hard real time OS has more jitter than soft real time OS

C.

Hard real time OS has equal jitter as soft real time OS
questions.correct_answer:
A.

Hard real time OS has less jitter than soft real time OS

questions.question:
The Linux command

 mknod myfifo b 4 16


(ISRO CSE 2017)
options:
A.

will create a character device if user is root

B.

will create a named pipe FIFO if user is root

C.

will create a block device if user is root
questions.correct_answer:
C.

will create a block device if user is root

questions.question:
A critical region

(ISRO CSE 2017)
options:
A.

is a piece of code which only one process executes at a time

C.

is a piece of code which only a finite number of processes execute

D.

is found only in windows NT operating system
questions.correct_answer:
A.

is a piece of code which only one process executes at a time

4, 37, 10,7,19,73,2,15,6,20
